findings.finding: Montgomery is recognized by runtime only as a disabled staged county.
findings.launchDecisionImpact: Supports moving to decision packaging; does not authorize activation.

findings.finding: The runtime gate remains false and activation/override attempts are blocked by normalization and operational-state checks.
findings.launchDecisionImpact: Supports a future V588 review of whether activation gates should remain closed or be separately authorized.

findings.finding: Cross-county contamination is blocked for Montgomery-to-Liberty, Montgomery self-context while disabled, and unknown county rows.
findings.launchDecisionImpact: Containment evidence is sufficient for launch-decision package preparation.

findings.finding: Liberty remains the operational default and selectable production county with data/-scoped runtime assets.
findings.launchDecisionImpact: No Liberty regression blocks V588 packaging.

findings.finding: V587 preserves Supabase, migration, historical, DriveTexas, and Transportation Intelligence boundaries.
findings.launchDecisionImpact: Protected systems remain outside Montgomery activation scope for V588 unless separately authorized.

observations: V587 is an evidence-collection milestone only.
Montgomery remains not activated, not onboarded, not selectable, and not production enabled.
V588 may package the launch decision, but V587 does not make the launch decision itself.

risks.risk: Future work could unintentionally change GRIDLY_MONTGOMERY_RUNTIME_GATE or runtime status fields.
risks.mitigation: Keep V584/V585/V587 runtime tests and protected-boundary audits in the launch-decision checklist.

unresolvedItems: No launch authorization has been granted.
No Montgomery production assets have been promoted into data/.
No Supabase or migration work has been authorized for Montgomery.
